overall_comment: Both required figures are present, readable, and communicate the zero-MSE result clearly with baseline comparison and residual-vs-noise-band diagnostic; minor polish would help but nothing blocking.

issues.issue: Suptitle visually collides with subplot titles.
Bright red line color deviates from muted palette in style.md.
Held-out test MSE bar invisible on symlog (value 0.0).
issues.fix: Annotate exact-zero with arrow or floor marker.
Add note that eval is deterministic on clean test set.
